name: monte-carlo-stats-root
description: 蒙特卡洛模拟与统计假设检验平台

scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.install:backend: cd backend && python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
